title: WEATHERIZATION - 211info
text: REDMOND OFFICE WEATHERIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides whole-home weatherization services, including a home audit that may include insulation installation, duct sealing, weather stripping, health and safety repairs, and replacement of inefficient appliances (e.g., furnaces, refrigerators). 2303 SW 1st Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Income no higher than 200% of the federal poverty level. Applicants can be renters or homeowners and live in mobile homes or site-built homes. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 548-2380 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 548-2380 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information or visit website to apply online FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income for all household members over age 18, current copy of electric bill, current copy of gas bill (if applicable), landlord's signature (if applicant is a renter), and proof of homeownership (if applicant is a homeowner). Other documents related to the structure and property will be discussed during the audit process. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, Hood River, Jefferson, Sherman, and Wasco Counties and the Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Services: Furnaces Home Safety Devices Refrigerators Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START FOOD - FRESH EXPRESS HOME DELIVERY FOOD - MOBILE FOOD PANTRY FOOD - NEIGHBORIMPACT FOOD BANK HOUSING/SHELTER - CENTRAL OREGON’S COORDINATED ENTRY SYSTEM HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMESOURCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - LENDING MONEY MANAGEMENT - REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. REDMOND OFFICE
